sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91758" key="purifo/ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πῠρι-φόρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n91758.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">holding heat</tr_>, prob. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:76" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.76</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
